backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining content sections, quiz data, guides, and query methods for retrieving and filtering them.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of frontend files with brief descriptions of each component or hook.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration defining base variables and theming for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry file mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up QueryClientProvider and rendering header, content, and footer.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main UI with tabs for scanner, educational sections, quiz, guides, and pest-specific content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with attribution, disclaimer text, and simple layout.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header displaying app branding with icon and title.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: Static informational content describing mouse identification, signs of infestation, and habitats.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: Static informational content covering scorpion identification, species, signs, habitats, and behavior.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Photo capture and editing tool integrating camera, upload, image editor, and saved scan tag management.
Displays downloadable PDF guides for a quiz section, handling loading, empty states, and file downloads.
frontend/src/components/Quiz.tsx: Renders a quiz for a section with question navigation, answer validation, scoring, and completion feedback.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Shows a gallery of saved scans with filtering, tag management, reordering, and delete confirmation.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Provides UI to add, edit, and remove tags on saved scans with inline editing and keyboard support.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Renders UI cards explaining common bed bug hiding spots, feeding behavior, and lifecycle with images and descriptive text. Provides educational content using alerts and styled components.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: Displays cards describing how to identify bed bugs, their life stages, and bite marks, including images and concise informational text. Uses alerts and UI components for structured guidance.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Provides prevention tips for avoiding bed bugs, focusing on travel precautions and used furniture inspection. Uses images and structured cards to present key steps.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Outlines heat-based bed bug treatments with safety alerts and detailed steps for effective dryer-based heat application. Uses cards and warnings to communicate best practices.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries when the actor changes. Uses React Query for caching and lifecycle handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Hook for processing images with rotation, zoom, and enhancement, maintaining processed state and exporting final images. Uses async operations and canvas-based blob export.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication and exposes login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching quiz questions, guides, and running quiz result mutations using an actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Manages saved image scans in localStorage with functions to add, delete, reorder, and tag scans.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles plus custom light and dark theme variables for the app's color system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it in query and identity providers.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Implements client-side image transformations including rotate, enhance, zoom, and crop.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, themes, utilities, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores the project’s versioned state, feature list, and requirements, outlining planned and existing capabilities for the pest education app and its photo scanner.
